expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜子的板材尺寸。[Width], [Height], [Depth]为总体尺寸，[BoardThick]为顶板、底板和侧板的厚度，[BackBoardThick]为背板厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total measurement, [BoardThick] is top, bottom, and side board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is background board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] เป็นขนาดรวมทั้งหมด [BoardThick] คือความหนาวัสดุบอร์ดบน ล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นพื้นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày của vật liệu ván trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày của vật liệu ván nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinukuwenta ang mga sukat ng board para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay ang kabuuang sukat, [BoardThick] ang kapal ng materyal sa tuktok, ilalim at gilid, [BackBoardThick] ang kapal ng materyal ng likod na board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: အိမ်သုံးမီးဖိုပေါင်းအိမ်စာရွက်ကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width], [Height], နှင့် [Depth] ကအတိုင်းအတာဆိုတာ၊ [BoardThick] ကထိပ်၊ အောက်၊ နှင့်ဘက်ဘော့်မာပင်၏အထူ၊ [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ဖုံးမာပင်၏အထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាដើម្បីកាត់ស្តុកសម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] ជាទំហំសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាសម្ភារៈដែលមានកម្រាស់លើ ក្រោម និងចំហៀងនៃស្តុក, [BackBoardThick] គឺជាសម្ភារៈដែលមានកម្រាស់នៃស្តុកខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂໍ້ມູນ ເພື່ອສ້າງລາຍຊື່ການຕັດ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ຄືມາດຕະຖານທັງໝົດ, [BoardThick] ຄືຄວາມໜາຂອງວັດສະດຸດອກ, ທາງຊ້າຍ , ທາງຂວາ, [BoardThick] >. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板材サイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] は全体の寸法を表し、[BoardThick] は上板、底板、側板の素材の厚みを表し、[BackBoardThick] は背面板の素材の厚みを表します。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 전체 크기이고 [BoardThick]는 상·하·측 보드 재질 두께이며 [BackBoardThick]는 뒷판 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de los tableros para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son medidas totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de los tableros superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material del tablero trasero. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour une armoire. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieures, inférieures et latérales, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platten, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] बैकग्राउंड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] - общие размеры, [BoardThick] - толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковых досок, [BackBoardThick] - толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
